scale_analysis.conclusion: SQMH somatic term 62 orders smaller than Hubble -> bg ODE ~ LCDM

interpretation: K31 CONFIRMED: SQMH homogeneous ODE (sigma=4*pi*G*t_P) produces LCDM-like E2(z). The somatic term sigma*rho_DE*rho_m is 62 orders of magnitude smaller than Hubble friction at background level. A12 wa=-0.133 cannot emerge from bg ODE. A12 remains a phenomenological proxy without bg-level SQMH derivation.
